headline: SiftedAI turns parcel cost monitoring from reactive to automatic
summary: SiftedAI, the leading logistics intelligence platform trusted by thousands of businesses, today announced the availability of Actions & Alerts within SiftedAI Copilot, an agentic AI platform for parcel shipping management that runs analyses, pulls the data it needs, and surfaces what requires attention without waiting to be asked. The new capability automates recurring shipping analysis and sends proactive notifications when costs shift, giving logistics teams a clear view of what's changing bef

content.title: SiftedAI turns parcel cost monitoring from reactive to automatic
content.summary: SiftedAI, the leading logistics intelligence platform trusted by thousands of businesses, today announced the availability of Actions & Alerts within SiftedAI Copilot, an agentic AI platform for parcel shipping management that runs analyses, pulls the data it needs, and surfaces what requires attention without waiting to be asked. The new capability automates recurring shipping analysis and sends proactive notifications when costs shift, giving logistics teams a clear view of what's changing bef
